payload.answer: Recorded Brain DB as the source of truth, Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection, Slack as strict memory intake; left Telegram addition and cheapest saturating model as open questions.
payload.decision: Set Brain DB as source of truth; treat Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection; make Slack a strict memory intake agent; leave Telegram and model-cost optimization as open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No unique IDs were provided in the input; entities are recorded by name only.

payload.intent: Extract architectural decisions and open questions from the provided chat summary for Brain memory.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection derived from Brain DB.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
Open question: Should Telegram be added later as an additional memory intake channel?
Open question: Which model is the cheapest option while still saturating performance?

details: Extracted three architectural principles and two open questions from the input summary.

repair_options: If entity IDs exist in a separate registry, map 'Brain DB', 'Cognee', and 'Slack' to those IDs.
Convert open questions into follow-up tasks if/when answers are decided.
